goal: Phase 4: Close the loop — add test-gate and retry logic to the system prompt so the agent runs tests after code changes, retries on failure, and only calls plan_complete after tests pass.

tasks.name: Update SYSTEM_PROMPT with test-gate and retry instructions
tasks.action: Extend SYSTEM_PROMPT with three new sections after the plan-execution instructions: (1) After every task that changes code, call run_tests then poll get_test_results until status is pass/fail. (2) If tests pass, then call plan_complete. (3) If tests fail, attempt to fix the code (re-read failing output, edit files) and re-run tests — retry up to 3 times. After 3 failed attempts, call plan_block with a summary of the failure. Do not call plan_complete while tests are failing.
tasks.verify: Read runenv.py and confirm SYSTEM_PROMPT contains test-gate instructions: run_tests, poll get_test_results, retry loop up to 3 times, plan_block on exhaustion.
tasks.done: SYSTEM_PROMPT in runenv.py includes run_tests gate, polling loop, 3-retry limit, and plan_block-on-exhaustion instructions.

tasks.name: Add test-gate instructions to PLAN_SYSTEM_PROMPT
tasks.action: Add a note to PLAN_SYSTEM_PROMPT reminding the planning agent that every task whose action modifies code should include 'Run tests and verify they pass' as a verify criterion, so the executing agent knows tests are expected.
tasks.verify: Read runenv.py and confirm PLAN_SYSTEM_PROMPT mentions test verification as a required verify criterion for code-changing tasks.
tasks.done: PLAN_SYSTEM_PROMPT in runenv.py includes guidance to include test verification in every code-changing task's verify field.

tasks.name: Update agent PLAN.md to mark Phase 4 items done
tasks.action: Mark the first two Phase 4 checklist items as completed: 'Update system prompt to instruct agent to run tests after code changes' and 'Add test-gate: agent should call run_tests + get_test_results before plan_complete'. Leave the end-to-end and failure handling items as-is since they require a live cluster run.
tasks.verify: Read cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md and confirm the two checklist items are marked [x].
tasks.done: PLAN.md Phase 4 section has two items marked [x].
